name: Mom's Marinated Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sliced fresh mushrooms, vegetable oil, sugar, minced garlic, tarragon vinegar, salt (if using), sliced ripe olives, and sliced onion.
2. Stir until all ingredients are evenly mixed.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.
